title: neottia tenuis
intro: Neottia tenuis, also known as the slender tongue orchid, is a perennial plant species in the orchid family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Neottia tenuis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or powder for oral consumption, and its herbal preparations are also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
